requirement_topic.en: FSM Market Access — DRD, State Utilities, and Nascent EV Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: FSM市场准入——DRD、州公用事业与起步阶段EV部署
requirement_topic.zht: FSM市場准入——DRD、州公共事業與起步階段EV部署

summary.en: The FSM Department of Resources and Development sets policy direction, while state utilities in Pohnpei and Chuuk govern operational connection points. The EV charging market is pre-mature, so exporters should not assume a single national EVSE standard route covers all products. Market entry should be mapped by importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio requirements, utility connection, site permits, labelling, safety evidence, and project-owner requirements. Public, hotel, fleet, marina, and government deployments may each impose different procurement conditions.
summary.zh: FSM由国家资源与发展部提供政策方向，波奈佩和楚克州公用事业治理具体运营接入点。FSM电动汽车充电市场仍处起步阶段，出口商不能假设存在单一全国EVSE标准覆盖全部产品。市场准入应按进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线要求、州公用事业接入、场地许可、标签、安全证据和项目业主要求逐项映射。公共、酒店、车队、码头、政府部署各自可能有不同采购条件。
summary.zht: FSM由國家資源與發展部提供政策方向，波奈佩與楚克州公共事業治理具體營運接入點。FSM電動車充電市場仍處於萌芽階段，出口商不能假設有單一全國EVSE標準路徑涵蓋全部產品。市場准入應按進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線要求、州公共事業接入、場地許可、標簽、安全證據及項目業主要求逐項對應。公共、酒店、車隊、碼頭、政府部署各自可能有不同採購條件。

standards_or_laws: Department of Resources and Development (DRD) — energy coordination and import context
State utilities in Pohnpei and Chuuk — project-level interconnection and charging infrastructure requirements
Importer, customs, tender, and site-owner requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: Chinese products are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 interface standards, GB/T 27930 communication, and China domestic conformity pathways. These records support domestic project review but do not establish FSM market access, state utility acceptance, or project procurement approval.
summary.zh: 中国产品通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930通信和中国国内合规路径建立文件。这些记录可支持国内项目审查，但不能直接确立FSM市场准入、州公用事业验收或项目采购批准。
summary.zht: 中國產品通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930通信與中國國內合規路徑建立文件。這些記錄可支持中國國內項目審查，但不能直接確立FSM市場准入、州公共事業驗收或項目採購批准。

gap.en: Before claiming FSM readiness, exporters should confirm importer of record, customs classification, DRD policy route, state utility requirements, radio module expectations, grid-connection process, and project-specific documentation before procurement. Chinese CCC/CQC or GB/T files should not be presented as FSM approval.
gap.zh: 在声称可用于FSM前，出口商应先确认报关主体、海关归类、DRD政策路径、州公用事业要求、射频模块要求、并网流程和项目文件，再开展采购。中国CCC/CQC或GB/T文件不应被表示为FSM批准。
gap.zht: 在聲稱可用於FSM前，出口商應先確認報關主體、海關歸類、DRD政策路徑、州公共事業要求、射頻模組要求、併網流程和項目文件，再開展採購。中國CCC/CQC或GB/T文件不應被表示為FSM批准。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — each EV charging product must be confirmed against the importer, customs, DRD context, state utility, and project owner requirements for specific HS code and deployment use.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification and GB/T evidence are not FSM market-access approvals

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FSM EV charging is at a formative stage. Do not rely on generic China certification bundles. Confirm DRD policy and each relevant state utility requirement for the exact charger, charger mode, and installation model before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] FSM EV充电市场仍处成形阶段。不能依赖通用中国认证资料包。报价或发货前应确认DRD政策和目标州公用事业对具体充电桩型号、模式和安装方案的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] FSM電動車充電市場仍處於形成階段。不能依賴通用中國認證資料包。報價或發貨前應確認DRD政策和目標州公共事業對具體充電樁型號、模式和安裝方案的要求。
